List all bundled Venn diagram models

Source: R/analysis.R
list_models.Rd

Returns metadata for the 44 bundled SVG model templates plus the `proportional` synthetic generator (added in Phase 3). Read from JSON region files in `inst/extdata/models/json/`.

Usage

list_models()

Value

A `data.frame` with columns `name` (filename stem), `set_count` (2-9), and `display_name` (from the JSON `name` field). Sorted by `(set_count, name)`.

Examples

head(list_models())
#>                           name set_count               display_name
#> 1                   venn-2-set         2         Venn 2-set diagram
#> 2          venn-2a-set-edwards         2 Edwards-Venn 2-set diagram
#> 3 venn-2e-set-carroll-triangle         2 Carroll Venn 2-set diagram
#> 4        venn-2e-set-rectangle         2         Venn 2-set diagram
#> 5                   venn-3-set         3         Venn 3-set diagram
#> 6          venn-3a-set-edwards         3 Edwards-Venn 3-set diagram
